project_parts.primary_tech: Rust (Axum 0.8, Tokio, rusqlite, reqwest, keyring, tray-icon, windows-sys/libmtp)

completed_steps.summary: Initialized state file; archived stale March 2026 state to .archive/
Classified as monorepo with 2 parts: daemon (backend) and ui (desktop)
Existing docs from 2026-03-08 found; full rescan confirmed by user

Exhaustive scan: all daemon modules (main, rpc, api, db, sync, auto_fill, scrobbler, transcoding, paths, service, device/mod, device/mtp, device_io) + all UI files (main.ts, library.ts, login.ts, rpc.ts, state/basket.ts, components/*.ts, src-tauri/lib.rs) + tauri.conf.json + package.json + CI workflows
source-tree-analysis.md written with full file tree, module LOC, responsibilities, dependencies
development-guide.md written with prerequisites, build commands, test commands, debugging
integration-architecture.md written: IPC (rpc_proxy/image_proxy), JSON-RPC protocol, sync flow, auto-sync flow
Architecture docs written for daemon (AppState, DeviceManager, sync engine, MTP, service) and UI (Tauri shell, BasketSidebar, library navigation)
API contracts (34 RPC methods), data models (DeviceManifest, SyncedItem, BasketItem, SyncDelta, etc.), component inventory (all 5 components + state/views)
Master index with quick reference, key architectural decisions table
Validation: all 9 doc files regenerated from exhaustive scan; no placeholder markers

findings.project_classification: Monorepo (Cargo workspace), 2 parts: Rust backend + Tauri 2 desktop
findings.api_summary: 34 JSON-RPC methods on localhost:19140 + image proxy endpoint
findings.data_summary: DeviceManifest (.jellyfinsync.json on device) + SQLite (devices, scrobble_history) + OS keyring (token) + localStorage (basket session)
findings.ui_summary: 5 components (BasketSidebar, MediaCard, StatusBar, InitDeviceModal, RepairModal) + 3 views (library, login, splash) + 1 state store (BasketStore)
